message.content:
@startuml
skinparam handwritten true
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #9FE2BF
  LifeLineBorderColor #000000
  ActorBackgroundColor #9FE2BF
  ActorBorderColor #000000
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #1E90FF
  ParticipantBorderColor #000000
  ParticipantFontColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantFontStyle bold
  ArrowColor #00BFFF
  ArrowThickness 2
}

actor User
participant "BaseExecutor" as BaseExecutor
participant "JdbcTransaction" as JdbcTransaction
participant "PooledDataSource" as PooledDataSource
participant "PooledConnection" as PooledConnection
participant "Proxy" as Proxy
participant "Connection" as Connection

User -> BaseExecutor: getConnection
BaseExecutor -> JdbcTransaction: getConnection
JdbcTransaction -> JdbcTransaction: openConnection
JdbcTransaction -> PooledDataSource: getConnection
PooledDataSource -> PooledDataSource: popConnection
PooledDataSource -> PooledConnection: <create>
PooledConnection -> Proxy: newProxyInstance
Proxy -> PooledConnection: 创建Connection代理类对象
PooledConnection --> PooledDataSource: 返回PooledConnection实例
PooledDataSource -> PooledConnection: isValid
PooledConnection -> PooledConnection: pingConnection
PooledConnection --> PooledConnection: 检测连接是否有效
PooledConnection --> PooledDataSource: 连接是否有效标识
PooledDataSource -> PooledConnection: getProxyConnection
PooledConnection --> PooledDataSource: 返回代理连接
PooledDataSource --> JdbcTransaction: 返回代理连接
JdbcTransaction -> Connection: setTransactionIsolation
Connection --> JdbcTransaction: 设置隔离级别
JdbcTransaction -> JdbcTransaction: setDesiredAutoCommit
JdbcTransaction --> JdbcTransaction: 设置提交模式
JdbcTransaction --> JdbcTransaction: 获取连接
JdbcTransaction --> BaseExecutor: 通过jdbc获取数据库连接
BaseExecutor --> User: 返回数据库连接

@enduml
